events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Paul McCartney celebrates his 84th birthday, a legendary musician and former member of The Beatles

angles.name: Paul McCartney Birthday
angles.copy: Paul McCartney turns 84 today, the legendary musician and former member of The Beatles, we're celebrating his birthday with some of his greatest hits

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 55
events.blurb: Alison Moyet celebrates her 55th birthday, the renowned singer-songwriter known for her work with Yazoo and as a solo artist

angles.name: Alison Moyet Birthday
angles.copy: Alison Moyet turns 55 today, the voice behind Yazoo and a successful solo career, we're playing some of her biggest hits

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77

angles.copy: Lionel Richie turns 77 today, the legendary singer-songwriter behind hits like 'All Night Long' and 'Hello', we're playing his greatest songs

events.title: George Michael would have been 63

angles.name: George Michael Tribute
angles.copy: Today we remember George Michael, who would have been 63, the iconic voice behind Wham! and a successful solo career, we're playing his greatest hits

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of Michael Jackson's death, the King of Pop and one of the most influential musicians of all time

angles.name: Michael Jackson Tribute
angles.copy: Today we remember Michael Jackson, the King of Pop, who passed away 17 years ago, we're playing his greatest hits and celebrating his legacy

events.title: MTV Launched 45 Years Ago
events.blurb: MTV launched 45 years ago, revolutionizing the music industry with its 24-hour music video format, the first video played was 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV launched and changed the music industry forever, we're celebrating this milestone with some of the biggest hits from the 80s

events.title: Oasis Released Definately Maybe 32 Years Ago

angles.name: Oasis Definately Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years ago, Oasis released their debut album 'Definately Maybe', which launched their career and became a classic of the 90s, we're playing some of their greatest hits

events.title: Woodstock Festival Took Place 57 Years Ago
